summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PropOps new features including role enforcement, inspection state machine, landing page, calendar view, and team invitations system. Backend API testing shows 100% success rate (20/20 tests passed). Frontend testing successful for landing page and authenticated navigation features.
passed_tests: Backend API health check
User registration and authentication
Organization management
Property, unit, tenant, and inspection CRUD operations
Staff user creation and invitation acceptance
Team invitation creation (Admin only)
Team invitation listing (Admin only)
Invite token lookup (public endpoint)
Calendar endpoint with inspections and lease dates
Inspection state machine valid transition (scheduled -> completed)
Inspection state machine invalid transition rejection (scheduled -> approved blocked)
Role enforcement: Staff cannot create properties (403)
Role enforcement: Staff cannot update tenants (403)
Role enforcement: Staff cannot approve inspections (403)
Role enforcement: Staff cannot delete documents (403)
Landing page loads with hero section, features, and CTA
Landing page navigation buttons work correctly
Landing page sections (pain points, features, CTA) are visible
User registration flow works from landing page
Dashboard loads after successful registration
Calendar navigation and page loading
Calendar controls (prev/next month, event filter) present

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (landing page and core navigation working, session management as expected)
